provenance: ARCHITECTURE.md section 10 normative example, copied verbatim. Canon: WorldBible section 9 - sky-blue/silver alloy; holds enormous energy without feeling hot until saturated; silver/blue -> gold at full charge; blades turn orange when hot from energy. Capacity 60000 cu / maxSafeDischarge 600 per ARCHITECTURE section 1 decision 14 (16-bit overlay rescale).
notes: HYBRID ruling (Eli, 2026-07-12): color stops are a pure FILL ramp, silver/blue -> pale gold -> full gold. Orange (#E8842A) is NOT a fill color — it is the heat-glow overlay the renderer applies while the tile is actively discharging or saturation-heating (driven by EnergyDischargedEvent / ChargeSaturatedEvent, see TILE-ART-SPEC). Saturation heat begins at 95% ('stays cool until saturated'). meltK 2600 is spec-normative, not canon.
